manifest.author: Neurocoda

manifest.description: Recommend semantically related notes from local metadata and insert curated links into your notes.

manifest.name: Semantic Todoist Sync

manifest.name: Semantic Notes Vault MCP
manifest.description: Give Claude Desktop and other AI assistants semantic access to your notes through a built-in Model Context Protocol (MCP) server.

manifest.author: gjtorikian
manifest.name: Semoi

manifest.author: Email2Obsidian
manifest.name: Send Email into Vault
manifest.description: Sync email-derived notes and attachments from a third party service into your vault with full formatting and dedupe.

manifest.author: Jamie Steiner
manifest.name: Send Note
manifest.description: Instantly send a note, to other obsidian users so they can import them into their vault. It uses AWS S3 as a storage backend. Data is shared encrypted by default, and only you and the person you send it to have the key.

manifest.author: wenlzhang
manifest.name: Send to Canvas
manifest.description: Send tasks, blocks, and notes to Canvas files as plain text, links, and embeds.

manifest.author: Southpaw1496
manifest.name: Send to Ghost
manifest.description: Send and publish notes to your Ghost blog with a single click

manifest.author: Garrett Swann
manifest.name: Sentence Enhancers
manifest.description: Enhances customization by adding additional contextual classes for use by plugins and themes.

manifest.author: Adam Fletcher
manifest.name: Sentence Rhythm
manifest.description: Adds toggleable colored highlights to sentences based on their length so you can easily see the rhythm of your writing.

manifest.author: Giorgos Sarigiannidis
manifest.name: Sentinel
manifest.description: Trigger actions based on document visibility changes.

manifest.author: David V. Kimball
manifest.name: Search Engine Optimization
manifest.description: Ensure your public-facing notes are optimized for search engines and AI.

manifest.author: alieron
manifest.name: Sequencer
manifest.description: Organise and traverse through notes as a sequence using a doubly-linked list like system.

manifest.author: Gaurav Ramesh
manifest.name: Serendipity

manifest.name: Sets

manifest.author: Huajin
manifest.name: Settings Management
manifest.description: Manage settings options, including show enabled/disabled plugins and css, grid layout, save current plugins/css enable config for quick enable/disable, etc.

manifest.author: 4Source
manifest.name: Settings profiles
manifest.description: Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.

manifest.author: Jeremy Valentine
manifest.name: Settings Search
manifest.description: Globally search settings in Obsidian.md

manifest.author: Golomp
manifest.name: Settings Sidebar Organizer
manifest.description: Groups Community Plugins into folders, allows renaming, reordering, and compacting the sidebar.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Better Search and Replace
manifest.description: Enhanced search and replace with regex support, live diff preview, capture groups, and a floating editor bar.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Click Image to Zoom
manifest.description: Click any image in your notes to open it in a full-size zoomable modal. Supports scroll-to-zoom, drag-to-pan, and per-note frontmatter control.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Open in New Tab
manifest.description: Forces files to open in new tabs instead of replacing the current tab. Covers all opening methods including Quick Switcher, command palette, bookmarks, search, backlinks, and graph view.

manifest.author: saltyfireball
manifest.name: Save as Local Images
manifest.description: Download all remote images in the current note and save them locally to your vault's attachment folder, rewriting URLs to point to the local copies.

manifest.name: ShaahMaat-md
manifest.description: Render chess positions.

manifest.name: Shadowdark Statblocks
manifest.description: Create, import, and render Shadowdark RPG monster stat blocks.

manifest.author: Milad Samimifar
manifest.name: Shamsi Date Converter
manifest.description: Automatically converts Gregorian dates to Shamsi (Jalali/Persian) dates. Supports multiple date pairs (start/end dates). Updates automatically when source dates change.

manifest.author: Till Friebe
manifest.name: Share as ZIP
